name: Module-Lattice-Based Digital Signature Standard
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: FIPS 204 (2024) standardizes ML-DSA (Module-Lattice-Based Digital Signature Algorithm, based on CRYSTALS-Dilithium) — NIST's primary post-quantum digital-signature standard.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud certificate authorities and code-signing services begin FIPS 204 adoption.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI model-signing and provenance attestation.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.
